name: Dikshit Rawat
content: I got the opportunity to be a disciple of Dhananjay sir some time back. Starting as a typical introvert village boy and now having turned into a competent speaker today, all credit goes to him. I studied English, French and German, wrote exams and cleared them well. To all those who seek Foreign Language classes, I highly recommend Unique Institue of Foreign Languages.

name: Ajay preet Singh
content: Looking forward to learning and confidently speak a new language feels a lot like that a star shining on you. Being a language learner, I always wanted to learn the French language, not because it is an interesting language, but I also in a need to have a strong hold on that for my studies in a French institution. Under the guidance of Dhananjay sir, I made it to that level to speak confidently with my peers at the university.

name: Akash Gurung
content: Excellent teaching skills by Dhananjay sir and very friendly approach by him. I had zero knowledge regarding foreign languages later on I studied Spanish and German, cracked exams and cleared them well with his guidance and assist, thank you sir for sharing with me Spanish and German language skills.

name: Drishya Ale
content: Being under the guidance of Dhananjay Sir was a life improving opportunity. Not only did I learn French but also learnt a different perspective of life. Sir's not only a good teacher but also an extraordinary soul. I highly recommend Unique Institute of Foreign Languages to everyone who wishes to learn and grow.

name: Sundaram Sharma
content: I got the opportunity to be a student of Dhananjay Sir two decades back. Started as someone who couldn't answer to a question which was asked by a centre receptionist 'What is your good name?'. But at present I'm Senior Technical officer in CSIR-IIP Deharadun and give Technical training to engineers of different refineries and the students of schools and colleges. All credit goes to Dhananjay Sir.

name: Mansha Reki
content: I am glad that I got the opportunity to be student of Dhananjay sir and I will always be his student throughout my Life. It's not about learning Language you opt but sir will teach us and guide us to be a Good person .Nobody in this world will give you such inspiration as sir used to give . I highly recommend Unique Institute of Foreign languages is Best to learn any Language.

name: Mohit Gauniyal
content: UIFL is without any doubt the best place to study Foreign Languages in Dehradun. I studied French and Spanish, and have cleared DELF(French) A1, A2 and DELE(Spanish) A1 exams. Dhananjay Sir is really supportive and has been an inspiration to me. He emphasises a lot on Speaking and Listening skills and prepared us well for the exams by conducting many mock interview sessions.

name: Jyoti Sharma
content: I am a French language at UIFL, preparing for A1, A2 levels under the guidance of Mr. Dhananjay Dhaundiyal. He is very supportive and well experienced teacher.He knows many other foreign languages as well. From the first grade till today, I have learned a lot and my overall experience here is truly amazing and worth telling. My journey from learning ABCD to speaking French has been amazing and I have seen many positive changes in me.

name: Chetan chauhan
content: It has been a wonderful experience studying with Dhananjay sir. He taught me French language. I have learnt A1 and A2. There is no one like him. Apart from French we also learnt some valuable life lessons from him. I am very thankful that I got an opportunity to be his student.

name: Priyanka bohra
content: It's been an absolute pleasure to join UIFL. I joined few months back to learn German under the guidance of Mr. Dhananjay sir. He and Dikshit sir are very good teachers, both conduct group work to avoid hesitation. They demonstrate confidence, and understand each student motivation, they focus on important stuff. Both have knowledge and command of the target language. All those who seek foreign language classes, please contact Dhananjay sir.

name: Navoditta Dogra
content: Teachers like you are the flower that add colours, fragrance and freshness in life. You are not only teacher you are friend, authority and inspiration. In 2005 I started French language with Dhananjay Sir and today i am giving French classes in Assam. Thank you sir for your support and guidance.

name: PRIYANSH KHANDURI
content: I wanted to learn German since a while and finally decided to pursue a course. It was my first time taking a class from UIFL and it exceeded my expectations. It is one of the best institutes in Dehradun to learn a foreign language. The faculty is knowledgeable and patient. Classes were interactive and allowed individual attention. It was a great experience .

name: ALOK TYAGI
content: I decided to learn French after my graduation. I met Dhananjay sir and was totally impressed with his communicating skills and command in different languages. I successfully completed my French language course under his guidance and it was an awesome experience altogether. Along with getting skilled in French language sir also helped me a lot in developing my communication skills. Thanks sir for being so generous.

name: RAJAT RAJPUT
content: Being a person who couldn't even speak english properly now teaching French language in a reputed school. It can be a dream only but Unique institute of Foreign Language made it possible. Best institute in the town because here you will learn, enjoy and perform. Highly recommended.

name: Anoop Chauhan
content: I would like to recommend UIFL to all those aspiring students who want to learn different languages and add an edge in their personality. I like the methodology of Dhananjay Sir very much, his way of teaching is very unique and when he teaches, we all grasp the topic with an utter easiness. He gave me all the guidance and career options in foreign languages. I got confidence and courage to speak language fluently. All credit goes to Dhananjay Sir.

name: Karan Gupta
content: In 2019, I decided to do something different so I thought of learning a foreign language, I was also fascinated by Spanish, but there was no one to guide me. When I met Señor Dhananjay, he guided and told me that if I prepare for DELE exams my resume will get more preference in Job. Way of teaching by señor was impressive. Environment there was very friendly, and he was always ready to help me. After completing A1 & A2 in 6 months,I appeared for DELE A2 exam where I Scored 75/100(Cleared). I am planning to do a post grad. diploma in business management from Spain.

name: Tsewang lhamo
content: My first day in unique institute was good and it was completely new experience for me, it’s a good place to learn French and teachers are great there, they always pushes us to speak in French.

name: Neeraj Pokhariyal
content: I have attended German classes at UIFL. Two things I would highlight about Dhananjay sir, 1. His padagogy, and 2. Dhananjay sir as a person. I have observed he did not leave any stone unturned in order to support me during my sessions. More importantly he designed his sessions in a such a way that even students from the Hindi medium can also learn foreign languages with an ease. Moreover, I have found a spiritual guru in him as well, he also guided me to sail through a devine journey towards “Shri Hari”. What a great combination of Gyan (Knowledge) and Bhakti (Devotion) I have experienced. I always love to take his classes and relish his company. Thank you for this beatific experience.

name: Anshuman Nautiyal
content: One decision I will cherish my entire life is to join UIFL which gave me the honor of being the student of Mr. Dhananjay Dhaundiyal. As a teacher, he gave me the tools I need to face my future. From being an underconfident individual to a proud and confident gentleman, Mr. Dhaundiyal has transformed my life and made me realize my self worth which has boosted my self confidence and instilled a sense of pride in myself . To inculcate discipline and etiquettes among students is one of the major concerns of this institute which makes it even more worth it. Communication and speaking skills, which earlier haunted me, are now my forte.I would like to express my gratitude to Mr. Dhaundiyal to help me learn English and French and for being my mentor which has transformed my life and my career.

name: Muhammad
content: I learnt German language under the guidance of Dhananjay sir and it was absolutely amazing. He is a very dedicated teacher and his methods are very easy to grasp. He understood where i lacked and worked on it and made German way too easy. If anyone’s out there seeking to learn German language, I highly recommend Unique Institute of Foreign Languages.

name: Manisha Bhandari
content: We people have this perception of learning something online where we cannot explore broadly but it changed my mind when I got an amazing opportunity to join the online class at UIFL under guidance of Dhananjay Sir. The session they are providing is extremely enlightening. What I love about them they have a different style of teaching a language and the goal is to encourage the student to continue speaking, writing or otherwise using the target language or to indicate that the student's utterance is correct or being understood. So by joining this institute I am glad to be a part of it. If you people are passionate about learning new languages and even people who are planning to move to European countries I'd highly recommend you to join this institute.

name: Vishal Uniyal
content: I joined this institute to learn French language. My all over experience is very good. The knowledge given by sir is very helpful to me & during classes they solve thought related to the topic. I have learnt many important points about French in general. The activities and assignments kept me busy thinking and applying.

name: Mani Meghley Bisht
content: UIFL has always been a home to me. Apart from fluency in languages, UIFL gives you life changing lessons. I have been a part of the institution since 2009 and have great experience. People often say I have the gift of the gab and it is only because Dhananjay sir who has not left any stone unturned for me to speak like a native English speaker. He is like a father to me. He has magnificent teaching skills. This is the sole place where you can learn to read write and speak effortlessly. Hare Krishna

name: Jayita khatri
content: The experience was very nice as the mentors were really supportive and helped me acquire practical knowledge about France. This has helped me learn a lot about the pronunciation and has improved my listening and speaking skills.

name: Gargi singhal
content: I always wanted to learn some new languages whenever I get the chance, and after 12th I got some break so I immediately started searching for the institutes to learn French....then I heard about Dhananjay sir and his institute and I immediately took admission there....it was the best experience of my life as I got to learn French in such a great environment under the guidance of such a good teacher.

name: Ayushi Sharma
content: UIFL is no doubt one of the most amazing Language learning Institute of Dehradun.. Dhananjay Sir is exemplary with his unique ways of simplified teaching.. The multiple ways of teaching a language include audio, video as well as free speaking .. He always makes sure to go over the curriculum thoroughly & clarify your doubts no matter what.. The class is full with lots of activities, handouts & experiential learning .. Atmosphere is great & small number of people in a batch add to the quality of education. Dhananjay Sir as a person is extremely knowledgeable motivating, supportive, religious & funloving .. I got the opportunity to learn German A1 level from Sir & passed my German Exam without any difficulty. I had a very positive & enriching experience !

name: Priyanshi jain
content: Few months back I joined UIFL to learn German language & it was an amazing experience for me. Dhananjay sir is one gem of a teacher. He puts in an extra effort to help you achieve your goals. I’m so grateful to him for all that he’s taught me. I would highly recommend UIFL to anybody seeking classes for foreign languages.

name: Vishal thakur
role: Senior Manager of an IT company
content: I enrolled for the German Language course with the UIFL in May 2021, and that perhaps has been one of the best decisions related to my continuous education. The quality of training is excellent! All their sessions are highly interactive, with emphasis on developing both spoken and written skills. Learning German grammar has been a breeze as the teachers provide exhaustive hand-on knowledge on the same, followed by rigorous practice sessions, role plays, and even mocks for those who wish to appear for the certification exam. I am a continuous learner, and having been a teacher myself, I chose to enrol for learning German Language with the UIFL in Dehradun purely based on their over 25 years of track record in successful training. What the institute offers is a simple strategy for easy and fast learning, at the same time ensuring students enjoy the learning process.

name: Sakshi Goswami
content: UIFL has been a great opportunity for me . From finding French a tough language to learn to now enjoying learning has been a great journey because of the teachers . I remember my first day , where I didn’t feel like i was joining a coaching but felt like home cause the overall environment was so welcoming. Special thanks to Dikshit Sir , whose efforts are countless and the one who makes learning fun.

name: Lalit Grover
content: Es ist ein sehr toll institut. Die menschen die Deutsch in Dehradun zu lernen wooollen, Das ist ein beste wählen. Ich war hier ein student. Mein Deutsch lehrer ist Pirma. Vielen Danke Lieber Herr Dhananjay Dhoundiyal.

name: Mrs. Puja Naithani
content: I would Regard him as a Guru in true sense as he removes the darkness and ignorance by giving the knowledge light ,If the knowledge is correct and complete it generates tremendous force which is called as devotion it is necessary force that transforms the knowledge into practice . He is a polyglot and the most dedicated teacher I ever met.He always plans his own syllabus and spends a lot of time experimenting different teaching methods to find out the most effective approach for each kind of student, I consider myself exceptionally fortunate to have been taught and guided by him.

name: Mrs Jaynti Gupta
role: French Teacher | Chemical Engineer, Texas, USA.
content: I joined UIFL in 2015. Dhananjay Sir's classes were a pleasure to attend. He made learning a Foreign language super easy. He made the classes interesting, entertaining and funny. He has a great sense of humor. He also added generous amounts of spirituality, singing and music in his classes which were added attractions for me. He helped me transition from a Chemical Engineer to a French language teacher in a matter of a few months effortlessly. I taught French to Middle School children in a Prestigious school in Gurgaon for many years. I think UIFL is really unique.

name: Vaishali Negi
content: I started my journey of learning French at UIFL,where my hopes were inspired and imagination got ignited by my mentor Doundhiyal Sir..He instills love of learning more and more in me..I learnt French and acquired good set of skills..Not only I learnt French but also moved my feet towards the real quest for life- SPIRITUALISM. I'm fortunate to have a mentor like Dhaundiyal Sir who ease my journey in making me agood soul.

name: Bhupendar Sharma
role: Quality head at wrapwell packing Pvt.ltd.
content: UIFL has been a great opportunity for me to learn German language.I am very thankful to him as a best teacher as well as his spirituality.I really enjoyed his teaching method.If anyone wants to learn seriously a foreign language then approach him.

name: Deepanjali Thapa
content: What makes a good teacher? For me, it's a person who genuinely loves his work and approaches it with enthusiasm; someone who, by their own passion for their subject, can motivate others to study; someone who can explain things well, and to whom students can always turn with their problems. And this person is Dikshit Sir. He makes german interesting, and he motivates you to thoroughly understand the language, not just limited to lessons. Learning Deutsch from him is the best combination of time spent and quality of learning. And the main thing is that he is a great teacher, who always inspires you, lifts your spirits, and leaves you with a positive feeling for the whole day! UIFL is the place where you will get to learn a lot and trust me, learning a new language will be made easy for you by the teachers here in all the possible ways. Thank you Dikshit Sir and Dhananjay sir for your efforts.

name: Aditi Bhatt
content: Searching for an institution which would have helped me to achieve my goal to become a polyglot with the best outcome possible,UIFL has provided me with the opportunity to do so. Special thanks to Parth sir who has been a great mentor from day one.His undying efforts made the language learning more fun and easy to comprehend.

name: Aanchal Singh
content: After searching a lot, someone suggested this institute to me for a language course. My experience is very good with it. The teachers are very good and supportive towards us. They have the best knowledge to give their students. Very useful & easy to comprehend. I would surely recommend to take up this institute for better learning.

name: Sakshi Sharma
content: My amazing journey learning French from scratch!

name: Amit Verma
content: Professional German coaching helped me land a job in Berlin.
